# Scape.js LLM Crawl Index

Project: Scape.js
Summary: Scape.js is a lightweight JavaScript library for animated website backgrounds with shape and image support.
Homepage: ./index.html
License: MIT

- ./Documentation.md
- ./LLM_PROMPTS.md
- ./CONTRIBUTING.md

- ./scape.js
